artwork_analysis.color_temperature: predominantly cool with vital warm accents
artwork_analysis.composition_type: field painting with structured elements and linear incisions
artwork_analysis.spatial_presence: immersive and expansive, creating a sense of deep, boundless space
artwork_analysis.artwork_function: focal point for introspection, structural anchor, symbolic narrative
suggested_audience: individuals interested in art exploring consciousness and landscape
artwork_analysis.commercial_positioning: a significant acquisition for discerning private collections or a prominent feature in design-led architectural projects
artwork_analysis.one_line_curatorial_read: A stark yet luminous dialogue between vast blue fields and potent red forms, charting an inner topography of presence and silence.

audience_profile.primary: discerning contemporary art collectors and high-end design professionals

contextual_proposals.context_role: primary residential showcase, emphasizing contemplative integration
contextual_proposals.space_type: minimalist living area with high ceilings
contextual_proposals.lighting: soft, diffused natural light from a large, subtly blurred window, suggesting a quiet afternoon
contextual_proposals.curatorial_reason: This setting allows the painting's deep blue and red forms to resonate with the quiet austerity of the space, inviting a personal and extended contemplation, reinforcing its role as a focal point for inner experience.
contextual_proposals.commercial_reason: Positions the artwork as an essential element in a high-design, luxury home, appealing directly to affluent private collectors and interior designers seeking impactful, yet serene, statement pieces.
contextual_proposals.prompt:
ARTWORK TECHNICAL DATA:
- Artwork size: vertical canvas, 80 cm wide × 120 cm high × 5 cm deep.

ARTWORK FIDELITY RULES:
- The artwork itself is not creative material for reinterpretation.
- Preserve the exact visible composition, colors, marks, brushstrokes, lines, symbols, texture, proportions, orientation, and edge shape of the provided root artwork.
- Do not redraw, repaint, crop, simplify, extend, mirror, rotate, recolor, stylize, blur, add marks to, remove marks from, or alter the artwork surface.
- Only the surrounding room, wall, lighting, scale context, shadows, furniture, and atmosphere may be generated or changed.

MOCKUP ART DIRECTION:
- Scene Name: Deep Horizon Living
- Purpose: primary residential showcase, emphasizing contemplative integration
- Scene Description: A minimalist living area with high ceilings with serene, sophisticated, intimate atmosphere. Materials: textured white plaster wall, polished concrete floor, dark wood console table
- Lighting: soft, diffused natural light from a large, subtly blurred window, suggesting a quiet afternoon
- Time of Day: afternoon
- Placement: Hang the artwork naturally on the wall at a believable height.
- Human Figure: Do not include any human figure.

CAMERA SELECTION RULES:
Use only front view, three-quarter left view, or three-quarter right view. Always show the artwork in near close-up, large and dominant in the frame. Do not use wide or open room views. The environment should only suggest context and must never be more important than the artwork.

NEGATIVE RULES:
Do not modify the artwork composition.
Do not redraw, repaint, reinterpret, restyle, extend, crop, simplify, enhance, or alter the artwork in any way.
Do not add, remove, rearrange, or invent elements inside the artwork.
Preserve the original composition, proportions, orientation, and internal structure of the artwork exactly as provided.No kitchens.
No common bedrooms.
No cheap decor.
No generic stock interiors.
No logos.
No visible text.
No letters, numbers, plates, labels, posters, dimensions, dimension lines, ruler marks, or annotations.
No shoes or footwear as scale reference.
No distorted perspective.
